info.title: Ontology Platform MVP6.11 Ontology Packs Planning API
info.description: Planning-only OpenAPI artifact for MVP6.11 Ontology Packs P0 (read-only ontology-pack catalog + deterministic dry-run apply-preview). Additive to MVP1-MVP6.10; replaces no prior OpenAPI draft. The surface is READ-ONLY: it lists exactly 3 deterministic in-repo MOCK ontology packs (each = a bundle of ontology elements only - classes/properties/relations - plus metadata), exposes each pack's detail, and runs a DRY-RUN apply-preview that maps the pack's elements to WOULD-BE DRAFT-layer items against a project's current DRAFT ontology. A preview APPLIES NOTHING, INSTALLS NOTHING, WRITES NOTHING: it creates no ontology class/property/relation, mutates neither the DRAFT nor the published graph, opens no change request, and never touches the candidate or published graph. A real apply is deferred and would route through the existing MVP1 ontology-edit / MVP6.6 governance-application (DRAFT-only, human-initiated) path. No external registry/fetch/download (deterministic in-repo mock packs). Every response carries an all-false 8-flag OntologyPackMutationGuard. See ADR 0018 and docs/pm/MVP6_11_ONTOLOGY_PACKS_BRIEF.md.

tags.name: MVP6.11 Ontology Packs
tags.description: Read-only ontology-pack catalog + deterministic dry-run apply-preview. Nothing installed, nothing applied, nothing written to any ontology layer; all-false mutation guard on every response.

get.description: Read-only GLOBAL catalog of the registered deterministic MOCK ontology packs (exactly 3: pack-insurance-core, pack-manufacturing-equipment, pack-legal-compliance). Packs are reusable, project-agnostic templates, so the catalog is not project-scoped. Byte-stable across calls. No external fetch. Any authenticated project member may list. Carries an all-false OntologyPackMutationGuard.

Read-only GLOBAL detail for one ontology pack: metadata plus the ordered list of bundled ontology elements (classes/properties/relations) it would contribute. Elements are described via OntologyElementRef-style descriptors (reused by reference, no rename); they are pack-internal element definitions, not references to any created ontology rows. Byte-stable. Unknown pack -> 404 ONTOLOGY_PACK_NOT_FOUND. Carries an all-false OntologyPackMutationGuard.

post.description: DRY-RUN apply-preview for a pack against a project's current DRAFT ontology. Deterministically maps each pack element to a WOULD-BE DRAFT-layer item with a per-item disposition (NEW / CONFLICT / DUPLICATE) and returns a compatibility/summary rollup plus a capped list of preview items. Creates NOTHING: no ontology class/property/relation, no change request; mutates neither the DRAFT nor the published nor the candidate graph. The DRAFT ontology is read ONLY to diff against; it is never modified. A real apply is deferred and would route through the existing MVP1 ontology-edit / MVP6.6 governance-application (DRAFT-only, human-initiated) path. Byte-stable for the same pack + same project DRAFT (modulo generated_at and preview_id). Bounded: counts are always exact; only items[] is capped (item_cap) with truncated + exact total_item_count. Invalid target (unknown pack / missing DRAFT ontology / empty pack) -> status BLOCKED with blocked_reasons (never a crash, never fabricated items). Any project member who can view the project may run it. Carries an all-false OntologyPackMutationGuard.

PackId.name: pack_id
PackId.description: One of the 3 frozen pack ids (pack-insurance-core / pack-manufacturing-equipment / pack-legal-compliance); unknown -> 404 ONTOLOGY_PACK_NOT_FOUND.

PackElementKind.description: Kind of an ontology element carried by a pack. Aligns verbatim with the existing ontology element kind vocabulary (MVP1 / MVP6.5-6.7 OntologyElementRef.target_kind / ChangeRequestTargetKind); no rename.

PackApplyPreviewStatus.description: READY: preview computed against the project's current DRAFT ontology. BLOCKED: invalid target (unknown pack / missing project / no DRAFT ontology) or nothing applyable; blocked_reasons explains (no crash, no fabricated items).

PackPreviewItemDisposition.description: Per-item disposition vs the current DRAFT ontology. NEW: no matching element in the DRAFT -> would be added. CONFLICT: an element with the same identity exists but differs -> would need human resolution, NEVER auto-overwritten. DUPLICATE: an identical element already exists -> would be a no-op.

PackApplyCompatibility.description: Dry-run compatibility rollup, mirroring the MVP5 import dry-run / MVP6.4 GoldSetImportCompatibility precedent. COMPATIBLE: all items NEW; would apply cleanly. WARNING: some DUPLICATE and/or CONFLICT items; applyable but flagged items need human resolution via the real-apply path. INCOMPATIBLE: invalid target or nothing applyable (paired with status=BLOCKED).

PackApplyTargetLayer.description: Target layer a preview item maps to. Single literal DRAFT: preview items are WOULD-BE DRAFT-ontology-layer elements only, NEVER candidate, NEVER published.

OntologyElementStatus.description: Ontology element lifecycle status. Reused BY REFERENCE from MVP1 / MVP6.4-6.7 (same values, no rename). Defined locally to keep this draft self-contained.

OntologyElementRef.description: A reference to a single ontology element. Reused BY REFERENCE from MVP1 / MVP6.5-6.7 (same shape, not renamed). Exactly one of the id fields is set, matching target_kind. In MVP6.11 it names the WOULD-BE mapped DRAFT-layer target of a preview item; it references an existing/would-be element identity and CREATES NOTHING. Defined locally to keep this draft self-contained.

ontology_version_id.description: The DRAFT ontology version the preview diffed against (the project's current DRAFT). Read-only context; never written.

status.description: The existing DRAFT element's status at the read moment (for CONFLICT/DUPLICATE items); null for NEW items (no existing element).

PackPreviewNotice.description: One warning or blocked-reason element (mirrors the MVP6.9 ConnectorPreviewNotice {code, message} pattern). code is a stable UPPER_SNAKE token (frozen vocabulary, deterministic/byte-stable; drives D6 badge / i18n); message is a deterministic human-readable string (Korean primary). Used by warnings[] and blocked_reasons[].

code.description: Stable UPPER_SNAKE token. Warnings: EXISTING_DUPLICATE_ELEMENT / NAME_CONFLICT_DIFFERENT_DEFINITION / UNRESOLVED_RELATION_ENDPOINT. Blocked: PACK_NOT_FOUND / NO_DRAFT_ONTOLOGY / EMPTY_PACK.

OntologyPackMutationGuard.description: All-false mutation guard present on EVERY ontology-pack response (catalog list, pack detail, apply-preview). Every flag is false, always; MVP6.11 turns NO flag true, ever. ontology_draft_mutated + published_graph_mutated are the headline assertions (distinct from the single MVP6.6 apply guard, which turns ontology_draft_mutated true; MVP6.11 turns no flag true). Mirrors the MVP6.1-6.9 all-false pattern.

PackElementDescriptor.description: One bundled ontology element carried by a pack (in pack detail). A pack-internal element definition (reused OntologyElementRef-style shape, by reference); NOT a reference to any created ontology row. Packs carry ontology elements only.

element_key.description: Pack-internal stable key for the element (opaque, URL-safe). Used for the element-identity match rule (G4) and deterministic ordering; NOT a created ontology element id.

OntologyPackElementCounts.description: Exact element counts for a pack. element_count == class_count + property_count + relation_count.

OntologyPackCatalogItem.description: One catalog entry (a deterministic mock ontology pack). Read-only descriptor; not an installed pack (nothing is ever installed/persisted as an install).

pack_id.description: Opaque stable pack id (one of the 3 frozen ids).

version.description: Single frozen version per pack (P0: 1.0.0; no multi-version management).

mock.description: Always true: deterministic in-repo mock pack; no external fetch.

OntologyPackDetailResponse.description: Pack metadata + ordered bundled elements. Read-only; global (project-agnostic).

elements.description: Ordered bundled ontology elements (classes/properties/relations). Deterministic order.

PackApplyPreviewRequest.description: Dry-run apply-preview request. Body is optional; the only field is an optional item_cap. The preview is computed deterministically from the pack + the project's current DRAFT ontology.

item_cap.description: Optional client cap on returned items[] (server enforces a hard max, P0=50). Counts remain exact regardless.

PackApplyPreviewSummary.description: Exact rollup counts over the pack's elements vs the DRAFT (always exact, never capped).

would_modify_count.description: Elements dispositioned CONFLICT (would need human resolution before a real apply).

conflict_count.description: Elements dispositioned CONFLICT (== would_modify_count in P0; kept explicit for clarity).

total_element_count.description: Total pack elements evaluated (== would_add_count + conflict_count + duplicate_count).

PackPreviewItem.description: One WOULD-BE DRAFT-layer preview item. preview_ref is opaque and is NOT a created ontology element id (nothing is created). target_layer is always DRAFT. mapped_ontology_ref reuses OntologyElementRef by reference.

preview_ref.description: Opaque, URL-safe, deterministic per (pack element + project DRAFT). NOT a persisted ontology element id.

mapped_ontology_ref.description: WOULD-BE mapped DRAFT-layer ontology element (OntologyElementRef, by reference). For NEW items the id fields may be null (no existing element); for CONFLICT/DUPLICATE they name the existing DRAFT element identity.

existing_element_label.description: Label of the existing DRAFT element (present for CONFLICT/DUPLICATE); null for NEW.

PackApplyPreviewResponse.description: Deterministic dry-run apply-preview. preview_only=true; creates nothing. mutation_guard is all-false. Byte-stable for the same pack + same project DRAFT, modulo generated_at and preview_id.

preview_id.description: OPAQUE preview handle; NOT a created ontology element / install id. G1 (Wave54): compute-on-read / EPHEMERAL recommended -> always null, no GET-by-id / list-preview endpoint. Either way read-only + all-false guard. EXCLUDED from the byte-stable determinism assertion.

generated_at.description: Set at response time; EXCLUDED from the byte-stable determinism assertion.

items.description: Capped list of would-be DRAFT-layer items (<= item_cap).

total_item_count.description: Exact total of would-be items even when truncated.

blocked_reasons.description: Non-empty ONLY when status=BLOCKED; empty otherwise.

routing_note.description: Boundary note, constant: 'preview only - nothing applied; a real apply routes through the existing MVP1 ontology-edit / MVP6.6 governance-application (DRAFT-only, human-initiated) path.'

ApiError.description: Standard error envelope. P0 ontology-pack codes: PROJECT_NOT_FOUND, ONTOLOGY_PACK_NOT_FOUND, PERMISSION_DENIED. Note: an invalid apply-preview target (e.g. no DRAFT ontology) normally yields a 200 preview with status=BLOCKED; 404 is reserved for a missing project / unknown pack.

items.name: 보험 코어 도메인 팩
items.description: 보험 코어 도메인 온톨로지 요소 번들 (mock).

items.name: 제조 설비 도메인 팩
items.description: 제조 설비 도메인 온톨로지 요소 번들 (mock).

value.description: 보험 코어 도메인 온톨로지 요소 번들 (mock).

items.note: 동일 identity가 존재하나 정의가 상이 -> human 해소 필요; 자동 덮어쓰기 안 함.

warnings.message: 동일 이름의 요소 2건이 DRAFT와 정의가 달라 실제 적용 전 human 해소가 필요합니다.
이미 존재하는 동일 요소 1건은 적용 시 no-op 처리됩니다.

value.routing_note: preview only - nothing applied; a real apply routes through the existing MVP1 ontology-edit / MVP6.6 governance-application (DRAFT-only, human-initiated) path.
